_doc: Trusted publisher registry: publisher name -> Ed25519 public key (hex). A SIGNED package must be signed by a key registered here to install on clients that load this file; unsigned packages remain installable under the curated-registry (reviewed-PR) trust model, surfaced with a warning. Add a key by PR: the same review gate that admits a plugin admits its author's key.
_official_publisher: The first-party catalogue is published as "DreamLayer Team" (author + official=true in every manifest/index entry) and today rides the curated-registry trust model. Cryptographic signing under a "DreamLayer Team" key is an owner action: generate the team's Ed25519 keypair off-repo, register ONLY the public key below, sign the six packages, and never commit the private key. Until then this stays empty by design.
